--- alter_table_alter_column_with_default_on_update.sql
ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN bar TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (pending_commit_timestamp()) ON UPDATE (pending_commit_timestamp())

--- AST
&ast.AlterTable{
  Name: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  TableAlteration: &ast.AlterColumn{
    Alter: 16,
    Name:  &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 29,
      NameEnd: 32,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
    Alteration: &ast.AlterColumnType{
      Type: &ast.ScalarSchemaType{
        NamePos: 33,
        Name:    "TIMESTAMP",
      },
      Null:        47,
      NotNull:     true,
      DefaultExpr: &ast.ColumnDefaultExpr{
        Default: 52,
        Rparen:  87,
        Expr:    &ast.CallExpr{
          Rparen: 86,
          Func:   &ast.Path{
            Idents: []*ast.Ident{
              &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 61,
                NameEnd: 85,
                Name:    "pending_commit_timestamp",
              },
            },
          },
        },
        OnUpdate: &ast.OnUpdate{
          On:     89,
          Rparen: 126,
          Expr:   &ast.CallExpr{
            Rparen: 125,
            Func:   &ast.Path{
              Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 100,
                  NameEnd: 124,
                  Name:    "pending_commit_timestamp",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN bar TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (pending_commit_timestamp()) ON UPDATE (pending_commit_timestamp())
